visa_types.name: National Visa
visa_types.overview:
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 but less than 180 days as a student, on a business trip, applicants who pick-up their residence permit in Austria, or you intend to take up short
                                                                term employment (less than 6 months) AND you are neither an EU nor an EFTA citizen, you need a national Austrian visitor visa (Visa D). The Visa D also entitles you to stay up to 90 days,
                                                                within the validity of the Visa D, to enter other Schengen countries.
- Work Visa (#workvisa)
- Approved Residence Permit (#forspecialpurpose)
visa_types.full_text:
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 but less than 180 days as a student, on a business trip, applicants who pick-up their residence permit in Austria, or you intend to take up short
                                                                term employment (less than 6 months) AND you are neither an EU nor an EFTA citizen, you need a national Austrian visitor visa (Visa D). The Visa D also entitles you to stay up to 90 days,
                                                                within the validity of the Visa D, to enter other Schengen countries.
- Work Visa (#workvisa)
- Approved Residence Permit (#forspecialpurpose)

visa_types.name: Work Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Documents Required
NOTE: Applicants should bring photocopies of all their supporting documents as per the stated requirements in a standard format. All documents should be in A4 size. 
List of accreditedTravel Insurance (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/fileadmin/user_upload/Vertretungen/Manila/Visa/List_of_Schengen_Insurance_Companies_20_October_2022.pdf)
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees
The Consular fees for the issuance of a Visa are:
- National Visa, valid for Austria: Php 13,962.00
- National Visa valid for Austria under 6 yrs old: Php 6,946.00
- Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc. via cash, e-payment (Gcash/Paypal) or card payments.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.forms:
National Visa Application Form 
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of
                                                                            submission.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work a maximum of 90 days. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required.  Applicant will
                                                                            have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work a maximum of 90 days. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required.  Applicant will
                                                                            have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees
The Consular fees for the issuance of a Visa are:
- National Visa, valid for Austria: Php 13,962.00
- National Visa valid for Austria under 6 yrs old: Php 6,946.00
- Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc. via cash, e-payment (Gcash/Paypal) or card payments.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Documents Required
NOTE: Applicants should bring photocopies of all their supporting documents as per the stated requirements in a standard format. All documents should be in A4 size. 
List of accreditedTravel Insurance (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/fileadmin/user_upload/Vertretungen/Manila/Visa/List_of_Schengen_Insurance_Companies_20_October_2022.pdf)

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the photo format, as explained in the photo requirement.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
National Visa Application Form 
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of
                                                                            submission. 

## 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for those who intend to visit their family or friends. If during any portion of their visit to Austria the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she
                                                                        must refer to other relevant visa categories.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for those who intend to visit their family or friends. If during any portion of their visit to Austria the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she
                                                                        must refer to other relevant visa categories.

## Visa Fees
The Consular fees for the issuance of a Visa are:
- Schengen visa: Php 6,444.00

- Schengen visa for ages between 6-12 years: Php 3,222.00 

- National Visa (6 yrs and older) : Php 13,962.00 

- National Visa valid for Austria (0- 6 yrs old) : Php 6,946.00
- Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc. via cash, e-payment (Gcash/Paypal) or card payments.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Documents Required
NOTE: Applicants should bring photocopies of all their supporting documents as per the stated requirements in a standard format. All documents should be in A4 size. 
List of accreditedTravel Insurance (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/fileadmin/user_upload/Vertretungen/Manila/Visa/List_of_Schengen_Insurance_Companies_20_October_2022.pdf)

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the photo format, as explained in the photo requirement.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form 
National Visa Application Form 
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of
                                                                            submission.

visa_types.name: Schengen Visa
visa_types.overview:
Short Stay visa entitles an alien, who does not hold a residence permit, to stay in Austria for an uninterrupted period or a total of successive periods of stays that does not exceed 180 days
                                                                in every six months since the date of first entry.
After scrutinizing the application, your application may have the following. 
- Visa applied for is granted.
- Further documentation is requested.
- Applicant is requested to appear for a personal interview.
- The application is rejected.
Short stay visa applications cannot be submitted more than 180 days in advance before the proposed date of travel. However, they must be submitted at least 15 days prior to the proposed date
                                                                of travel. VFS Global is the outsourcing office responsible for the reception and release of passports for short stay visa applications. 
- Tourist Visa (#touristvisa)
- Visiting Family and Friends (#visitingfamilyandfriends)
- Seafarer (#seafarer)
- Business Visa (#businessvisa)
- Work Visa (C) (#workvisa(c))
- For Papua New Guinean Nationals (#forpapuanewguineannationals)
visa_types.full_text:
Short Stay visa entitles an alien, who does not hold a residence permit, to stay in Austria for an uninterrupted period or a total of successive periods of stays that does not exceed 180 days
                                                                in every six months since the date of first entry.
After scrutinizing the application, your application may have the following. 
- Visa applied for is granted.
- Further documentation is requested.
- Applicant is requested to appear for a personal interview.
- The application is rejected.
Short stay visa applications cannot be submitted more than 180 days in advance before the proposed date of travel. However, they must be submitted at least 15 days prior to the proposed date
                                                                of travel. VFS Global is the outsourcing office responsible for the reception and release of passports for short stay visa applications. 
- Tourist Visa (#touristvisa)
- Visiting Family and Friends (#visitingfamilyandfriends)
- Seafarer (#seafarer)
- Business Visa (#businessvisa)
- Work Visa (C) (#workvisa(c))
- For Papua New Guinean Nationals (#forpapuanewguineannationals)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A Business visa is required if during any portion of the visit applicant intends to conduct business or commercial activities. e.g.; Meetings, Conference, Trainings, Trade Fairs,
                                                                            etc; such visas can only be issued to travellers not being paid for work by an entity within Austria and its representing countries. If the applicant intends to undertake paid
                                                                            work in Austria and its representing countries, he/she will need to obtain a work visa
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A Business visa is required if during any portion of the visit applicant intends to conduct business or commercial activities. e.g.; Meetings, Conference, Trainings, Trade Fairs,
                                                                            etc; such visas can only be issued to travellers not being paid for work by an entity within Austria and its representing countries. If the applicant intends to undertake paid
                                                                            work in Austria and its representing countries, he/she will need to obtain a work visa

## Visa Fees
The Consular fees for the issuance of a Visa are:
- Schengen visa: Php 6,444.00

- Schengen visa for ages between 6-12 years: Php 3,222.00 

- National Visa (6 yrs and older) : Php 13,962.00 

- National Visa valid for Austria (0- 6 yrs old) : Php 6,946.00
- Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc. via cash, e-payment (Gcash/Paypal) or card payments.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Documents Required
NOTE: Applicants should bring photocopies of all their supporting documents as per the stated requirements in a standard format. All documents should be in A4 size. 
List of accreditedTravel Insurance (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/fileadmin/user_upload/Vertretungen/Manila/Visa/List_of_Schengen_Insurance_Companies_20_October_2022.pdf)

- Click on the form link

OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the photo format, as explained in the photo requirement.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Only seamen who are nationals from a country which is required to have a valid visa to enter the Schengen space need to apply for a seamen transit visa and if they intend to join
                                                                            a ship that is (or will be) in a Schengen port, land with the aim of joining another ship that is arriving (or will arrive) in a Schengen port, or land due to sickness, repatriation,
                                                                            holiday and so on.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Only seamen who are nationals from a country which is required to have a valid visa to enter the Schengen space need to apply for a seamen transit visa and if they intend to join
                                                                            a ship that is (or will be) in a Schengen port, land with the aim of joining another ship that is arriving (or will arrive) in a Schengen port, or land due to sickness, repatriation,
                                                                            holiday and so on.

## Visa Fees
The Consular fees for the issuance of a Visa are:
- Schengen visa: Php 6,444.00

- Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc via cash, e-payment (Gcash/Paypal) or card payments.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Documents Required
NOTE: Applicants should bring photocopies of all their supporting documents as per the stated requirements in a standard format. All documents should be in A4 size. 
List of accreditedTravel Insurance (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/fileadmin/user_upload/Vertretungen/Manila/Visa/List_of_Schengen_Insurance_Companies_20_October_2022.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria and pick up their residence permit which has been already processed and approved by the Austrian Authority. Applicant
                                                                            will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria and pick up their residence permit which has been already processed and approved by the Austrian Authority. Applicant
                                                                            will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

- National Visa, valid for Austria: Php 13,962.00

- Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc. via cash or credit card.

## Documents Required

click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
*For approved residence permit applicants, kindly refer to the checklist provided by the embassy.

                                                                            submission. 

## 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list

visa_types.documents_required:
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Documents Required
NOTE: Applicants should bring photocopies of all their supporting documents as per the stated requirements in a standard format. All documents should be in A4 size. 
List of accreditedTravel Insurance (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/fileadmin/user_upload/Vertretungen/Manila/Visa/List_of_Schengen_Insurance_Companies_20_October_2022.pdf)
visa_types.visa_fees:
The Consular fees for the issuance of a Visa are:
- Schengen visa: Php 6,444.00
- Schengen visa for ages between 6-12 years: Php 3,222.00
Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc via cash, e-payment (Gcash/Paypal) or card payments.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. Applicant should made sure that his/her longest stay in Schengen area is in Austria (Lithuania) regardless of the first entry. If during any portion of their visit to Austria the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. Applicant should made sure that his/her longest stay in Schengen area is in Austria (Lithuania) regardless of the first entry. If during any portion of their visit to Austria the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.

## Visa Fees
The Consular fees for the issuance of a Visa are:
- Schengen visa: Php 6,444.00
- Schengen visa for ages between 6-12 years: Php 3,222.00
Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc via cash, e-payment (Gcash/Paypal) or card payments.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Documents Required
NOTE: Applicants should bring photocopies of all their supporting documents as per the stated requirements in a standard format. All documents should be in A4 size. 
List of accreditedTravel Insurance (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/fileadmin/user_upload/Vertretungen/Manila/Visa/List_of_Schengen_Insurance_Companies_20_October_2022.pdf)

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the photo format, as explained in the photo requirement.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form 
As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of
                                                                            submission. 

## 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work a maximum of 90 days. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required.  Applicant will
                                                                            have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work a maximum of 90 days. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) is required.  Applicant will
                                                                            have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees
The Consular fees for the issuance of a Visa are:
- Schengen visa: Php 6,444.00

- Apart from the visa fee, there is also a logistics fee of Php 2,685.00 payable to VFS Services Philippines Pvt Inc via cash, e-payment (Gcash/Paypal) or card payments.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Documents Required
NOTE: Applicants should bring photocopies of all their supporting documents as per the stated requirements in a standard format. All documents should be in A4 size.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 10 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.name: For Papua New Guinean Nationals
visa_types.overview:
Instruction for Papua New Guinea Applicants

- Prepare the documents listed on the checklist as per the visa sub-category you are applying for. Once your documents are available, kindly scan all your documents and send it to info.atph@vfshelpline.com (mailto:info.atph@vfshelpline.com) with the following details:
- Name:
- Date of Birth:
- Nationality:
- Passport Number:
- Passport Expiry Date:
- Purpose of Travel to Austria:
- Travel date to Austria:
- Preferred appointment date:
- Email and Mobile Number:
 

- Once we receive the scanned copy of your documents, we will forward it to the Austrian Embassy Manila and shall wait for feedback.
- Appointment slots for Papua New Guinea will only be available from:
- Mondays and Tuesdays
- 7:00-10:00 only
- We will book your appointment when we receive the above details.

- Processing Time
- The processing time for visa applications of PNG nationals may vary from the standard processing time of 5-10 working days.

Please inform us if you have special requirements, e.g. due to short term business meeting schedules.
visa_types.full_text:
Instruction for Papua New Guinea Applicants

- Prepare the documents listed on the checklist as per the visa sub-category you are applying for. Once your documents are available, kindly scan all your documents and send it to info.atph@vfshelpline.com (mailto:info.atph@vfshelpline.com) with the following details:
- Name:
- Date of Birth:
- Nationality:
- Passport Number:
- Passport Expiry Date:
- Purpose of Travel to Austria:
- Travel date to Austria:
- Preferred appointment date:
- Email and Mobile Number:
 

- Once we receive the scanned copy of your documents, we will forward it to the Austrian Embassy Manila and shall wait for feedback.
- Appointment slots for Papua New Guinea will only be available from:
- Mondays and Tuesdays
- 7:00-10:00 only
- We will book your appointment when we receive the above details.

- Processing Time
- The processing time for visa applications of PNG nationals may vary from the standard processing time of 5-10 working days.

Please inform us if you have special requirements, e.g. due to short term business meeting schedules.
